bind_ref.description: A card data path reference, e.g. 'card_data.raw_quotes' or 'requires.upstream'

bind_or_literal.description: A literal value or a bind reference object

fn.description: Function name from the built-in vocabulary

input.description: card_data.path, literal, array of inputs, or nested compute_expr

field.description: For pluck/sum/group — the object key to extract

where.description: For filter — predicate expression ($ = current item)

then.description: For if — value when cond is truthy

else.description: For if — value when cond is falsy

requires.description: IDs of upstream nodes this node depends on

src.description: Path to read value from (card_data.*, requires.*, fetched_sources.*, computed_values.*)

provides.description: Explicit bindings exposing computed or card_data values downstream as named tokens

compute_step.description: A single ordered compute step: reads card_data.*/requires.*/computed_values.*, writes to computed_values[bindTo]

bindTo.description: Key in computed_values to write result

expr.description: JSONata expression evaluated against { card_data, requires, fetched_sources, computed_values }

source_def.description: One source entry. The engine requires 'bindTo' (compute namespace key) and 'outputFile' (delivery signal path). bindTo and outputFile must be unique across all sources in a card. Every other property is yours — add whatever your task-executor needs: kind, url, headers, mailbox, channel, model, query, etc. The full object is passed verbatim as the --in JSON to the executor.

bindTo.description: Key under fetched_sources.* available in compute expressions

outputFile.description: Board-relative path the executor writes its JSON result to. Presence of this file signals delivery.

optionalForCompletionGating.description: When true this source does not gate card completion. Default false when absent, so sources are completion-gating by default.

timeout.description: Executor/script timeout in ms. Default: 120 000 (2 min).

script.description: Legacy direct-run: shell command executed when no .task-executor is registered. stdout is captured as the result.

id.description: Optional element ID for targeted updates

visible.description: card_data/requires/fetched_sources/computed_values path — element shown only if truthy

writeTo.description: card_data path for user input (form, filter, todo, notes)

upload.description: file-upload: show drop zone (false = read-only file list)

title: LiveCard
description: A unified card node. Behavior depends on which sections are present (sources, compute, view, etc.)

card_data.description: Authored card data and runtime metadata. Includes uploaded-file metadata maintained by host handlers and inference evaluation results.

files.description: Optional uploaded-file metadata maintained by host handlers. Stored name is normalized and serial-prefixed (for example 001-my_file.pdf).

llm_task_completion_inference.description: Inference evaluation result when custom when_is_task_completed rule is present. Written by inference adapter after evaluating completion rule.

inferenceRequested.description: Timestamp when the latest inference request was initiated

inferenceCompletedAt.description: Timestamp when the latest inference request completed

isTaskCompleted.description: Whether the task is considered complete by the adapter

sources.description: Source entries. Each entry is passed verbatim to the board's .task-executor (registered via init --task-executor) as the --in JSON file. The executor fetches/generates the data and writes JSON to --out. If no executor is registered, the built-in executor runs the entry's 'cli' command directly. Sources gate completion by default. Set optionalForCompletionGating: true for enrichment-only sources that should not block task-completed.

compute.description: Ordered array of compute steps. Each reads card_data.*/requires.*/fetched_sources.*/computed_values.* and writes to ephemeral computed_values[bindTo].

when_is_task_completed.description: Custom task completion rule. When present, invokes the inference adapter (--inference-adapter) instead of gating on source delivery. The rule text is passed as the 'completionRule' field to the adapter. Absence defaults to 'all_required_sources_fetched'.
